rationale: Educ. Code §12.115 governs charter school revocation and governance reconstitution. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 12.115. BASIS FOR CHARTER REVOCATION OR MODIFICATION OF GOVERNANCE.
_note: The cited rule concerns open-enrollment charter school accountability and governance; it does not reference property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13.
